scripts.build: cd packages/types && npm run build && cd ../ebay-scraper && npm run build && cd ../sdk && npm run build && cd ../mcp && npm run build && cd ../api && npm run build && cd ../cli && npm run build && cd ../extension && npm run build && cd ../../apps/docs && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "types,scraper,sdk,api,mcp" --prefix-colors "gray,magenta,cyan,green,white" "cd packages/types && npm run dev" "cd packages/ebay-scraper && npm run dev" "cd packages/sdk && npm run dev" "cd packages/api && npm run dev" "cd packages/mcp && npm run dev"
